fields.summary: Represents arguments used to customize the instantiation of a typeface.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments" /> holds the customization arguments passed to <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)" /> to create a new typeface variant. You can specify a collection index, a named palette, palette overrides, and variation design position coordinates.

## Examples

```csharp
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    CollectionIndex = 0,
    PaletteIndex = 0,
    VariationDesignPosition = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
    {
        new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = new SKFourByteTag('w','g','h','t'), Value = 700 }
    }
};
using var cloned = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the font within a font collection (TTC).
fields.value: The zero-based collection index. The default is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the index of the color palette to use.
fields.value: The zero-based palette index. The default is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the color overrides to apply to the selected palette.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> entries that replace individual palette colors.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation design position coordinates for variable font axes.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values specifying the axis and its design-space value.
